examples: The Lenape used a money system of their own invention called "wampum."
Many of the Lenape, meanwhile, wondered why European men did women's work like farming.
Therefore, some Europeans viewed Lenape men as lazy, letting their women do all the work.
On March 15, Acting Supreme Court Justice Robert Wiggins in Livingston County ruled against Lenape on all counts.
Michael Joy, Lenape's attorney, said Tuesday he hadn't seen the decision.
